message:
refactor(rch): extract config_doctor and config_init modules (bd-1f0i)

Split config.rs (was 3106 lines) into smaller modules:
- config_doctor.rs (437 lines) - doctor diagnostics
- config_init.rs (712 lines) - init wizard and templates
- config.rs (1989 lines) - remaining config commands

Also:
- Remove duplicate send_daemon_command from mod.rs (use helpers)
- Fix module declarations and imports for new structure
- Update init.rs to import from config_init module

All files now under 2000 lines (success criterion for bd-1f0i).

Passes: cargo check, clippy, tests (63 passed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
